testcase.name: putSyncModeSwitchesToPojo
testcase.system-out: 2026-04-16T12:19:15.745-04:00 INFO 5066 --- [rjsf-form-service] [ main] c.e.r.s.s.RelationalSyncStrategyManager : Relational sync mode changed: MAPPER → POJO

testcase.name: putSyncModeSwitchesBackToMapper
testcase.system-out: 2026-04-16T12:19:15.750-04:00 INFO 5066 --- [rjsf-form-service] [ main] c.e.r.s.s.RelationalSyncStrategyManager : Relational sync mode changed: POJO → MAPPER

testcase.name: mapperOverviewSync
testcase.system-out: 2026-04-16T12:19:15.782-04:00 DEBUG 5066 --- [rjsf-form-service] [ main] c.egs.rjsf.transformer.db.SqlExecutor : Executing upsert on 'form_pre_award_overview': INSERT INTO form_pre_award_overview (award_id, pi_budget, final_recommended_budget, funding_source, negotiation_status, program_manager, co_principal_investigator, contract_grants_specialist, branch_chief, prime_award_type, pi_notification_date, personnel, overview_notes, schema_version) VALUES (:award_id, :pi_budget, :final_recommended_budget, :funding_source, :negotiation_status, :program_manager, :co_principal_investigator, :contract_grants_specialist, :branch_chief, :prime_award_type, :pi_notification_date, :personnel, :overview_notes, :schema_version) ON CONFLICT (award_id) DO UPDATE SET pi_budget = EXCLUDED.pi_budget, final_recommended_budget = EXCLUDED.final_recommended_budget, funding_source = EXCLUDED.funding_source, negotiation_status = EXCLUDED.negotiation_status, program_manager = EXCLUDED.program_manager, co_principal_investigator = EXCLUDED.co_principal_investigator, contract_grants_specialist = EXCLUDED.contract_grants_specialist, branch_chief = EXCLUDED.branch_chief, prime_award_type = EXCLUDED.prime_award_type, pi_notification_date = EXCLUDED.pi_notification_date, personnel = EXCLUDED.personnel, overview_notes = EXCLUDED.overview_notes, schema_version = EXCLUDED.schema_version, updated_at = NOW() 2026-04-16T12:19:15.787-04:00 INFO 5066 --- [rjsf-form-service] [ main] c.e.r.t.service.SubmissionWriteService : Upserted section 'overview' for award 57875cae-196a-4527-b053-92ad66b3b328 into 'form_pre_award_overview'

testcase.name: mapperSafetySync
testcase.system-out: 2026-04-16T12:19:15.815-04:00 DEBUG 5066 --- [rjsf-form-service] [ main] c.egs.rjsf.transformer.db.SqlExecutor : Executing upsert on 'form_pre_award_safety': INSERT INTO form_pre_award_safety (award_id, safety_q1, programmatic_rec, safety_q2, safety_q3, safety_q4, safety_q5, safety_q6, safety_q7, safety_q8, safety_notes, schema_version) VALUES (:award_id, :safety_q1, :programmatic_rec, :safety_q2, :safety_q3, :safety_q4, :safety_q5, :safety_q6, :safety_q7, :safety_q8, :safety_notes, :schema_version) ON CONFLICT (award_id) DO UPDATE SET safety_q1 = EXCLUDED.safety_q1, programmatic_rec = EXCLUDED.programmatic_rec, safety_q2 = EXCLUDED.safety_q2, safety_q3 = EXCLUDED.safety_q3, safety_q4 = EXCLUDED.safety_q4, safety_q5 = EXCLUDED.safety_q5, safety_q6 = EXCLUDED.safety_q6, safety_q7 = EXCLUDED.safety_q7, safety_q8 = EXCLUDED.safety_q8, safety_notes = EXCLUDED.safety_notes, schema_version = EXCLUDED.schema_version, updated_at = NOW() 2026-04-16T12:19:15.817-04:00 INFO 5066 --- [rjsf-form-service] [ main] c.e.r.t.service.SubmissionWriteService : Upserted section 'safety_review' for award 57875cae-196a-4527-b053-92ad66b3b328 into 'form_pre_award_safety'
